original: This is a ‘JoyCo Bunny’ outfit. It’s not a full bunny outfit - there’s only satin ears and a fluffy tail. The rest of the outfit is hardly furry; a strapless one-piece bikini, black pantyhose, high heels, a collar with bow tie, and cuffs with cuff links. Wear it and be a Joy-Bunny!
context: <<POS:05484559>> e.tooltip='This is a ‘JoyCo Bunny’ outfit. It’s not a full bunny outfit'
